parameters.subject: CMCA Application Received – Action Required
parameters.message:
= CMCA Application Received – Action Required

QUICK & EASY APPROVALS. STRAIGHTFORWARD PROCESS.

Hello,

Thank you for contacting CMCA Financial Services. We’ve received your request and are ready to begin your application.

To proceed, please complete your application using the secure DocuSign link below. This is the fastest and most efficient way to finalize your submission.

COMPLETE YOUR APPLICATION

No printing or scanning required.

COMPLETE APPLICATION

Once your information is received, our underwriting team will review your file and contact you with the financing options available.

If you have any questions during the process, our team is here to assist you underwriting@cmcafinance.com.

CMCA is committed to responsible, secure, and transparent lending.

We are accredited by the Better Business Bureau

Proud member of the Canadian Lender Association

Note: If you prefer to complete a PDF version of the application instead, simply reply to this email to request the form. Docusign is the preferred method.

CMCA – Canadian Merchant Cash Advance
Underwriting & Client Services

CMCA Finance® Corporate Office
309 Lakeshore Blvd. Pointe-Claire, QC H9S 4L6
Phone: 1-855-651-2844
Fax: 1-855-541-6893
www.canadianmerchantcashadvance.ca   underwriting@cmcafinance.com

parameters.subject: Update on Your CMCA Application
parameters.message:
= Reminder: Documents Needed to Complete OUR Review

QUICK & EASY APPROVALS. STRAIGHTFORWARD PROCESS.

Hello,

Thank you for submitting your application and providing your information.

After reviewing your file, our underwriting team determined that your business is still at an early startup stage, which unfortunately falls outside of CMCA’s current lending criteria.

This is not a reflection of the quality of your business—only its stage of development. Many clients become eligible once they have additional operating history and stronger banking activity.

We would be pleased to reassess your application in the coming months once your business has:

  • A few more months of consistent operating activity
  • Regular business banking history
  • Steady incoming deposits

At that point, we can take a much closer look at potential financing options for you.

If you have questions or would like guidance on what to prepare for a future review, feel free to reply to this email. We’re here to support you as your business grows.

Thank you again for considering CMCA.

CMCA is committed to responsible, secure, and transparent lending.

We are accredited by the Better Business Bureau

Proud member of the Canadian Lender Association

Note: If you prefer to complete a PDF version of the application instead, simply reply to this email to request the form. Docusign is the preferred method.

CMCA – Canadian Merchant Cash Advance
Underwriting & Client Services

CMCA Finance® Corporate Office
309 Lakeshore Blvd. Pointe-Claire, QC H9S 4L6
Phone: 1-855-651-2844
Fax: 1-855-541-6893
www.canadianmerchantcashadvance.ca   underwriting@cmcafinance.com
